summary: Added a read-only doctor envelope to mission-lock-output-schema-validator so agents can inspect schema, mission input, backend, and tmp readiness without validating or mutating the live mission file.

proof.summary: 9/0 focused assertions: doctor and --doctor emit mission-lock-output-schema-validator.doctor.v1 with mutates=false, info/help/examples advertise doctor, missing mission input warns read-only, valid fixture passes, invalid fixture returns rc=1 with missing-field evidence.
Touched shell surfaces are ShellCheck clean.
Live read-only doctor reports schema mission-lock-output-schema-validator.doctor.v1, status pass, mutates=false, schema readable, mission input readable, jsonschema available, and tmp writable.
Inventory regenerated; mission-lock-output-schema-validator.sh now reports doctor_subcommand_status=basic instead of absent.

parent_state.reason: The broader doctor-mode wave remains open; this closes one scoped mission-lock validator surface only.
